g.text: Log scale; Happ-Greven joint operator (n=350 panel)
Golovkine 2025 sits between Cattell scree (under-fits) and per-block FVE (over-parametrises)
K_primary=12 at FVE>=0.90; K_sensitivity=15 at FVE>=0.95; N/K=29.2
DI3 — Eigenvalue spectrum and Golovkine multivariate-FVE threshold
